item.title: StablecoinX Begins Nasdaq Trading as First Public ENA Treasury Vehicle
item.description: StablecoinX Inc. (Nasdaq: USDE) began trading Friday after closing its SPAC merger with TLGY Acquisition Corp., becoming the first publicly listed company holding approximately 3.03 billion ENA tokens and building infrastructure for the Ethena ecosystem.

item.title: Jose explains why frontier AI may keep its pricing power. “I think the frontier is always going to be way more expensive and create way more of the economic value.”
item.description: pJose explains why frontier AI may keep its pricing power.br /br /“I think the frontier is always going to be way more expensive and create way more of the economic value.”/pa href="https://nitter.net/Delphi_Digital/status/2070526449111769369#m"br /Videobr / img src="https://nitter.net/pic/amplify_

item.title: New paper on stablecoins from the Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia uses DefiLlama as a primary data source. When you use DefiLlama, you have access to the same data used by central banks and insti
item.description: pNew paper on stablecoins from the Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia uses DefiLlama as a primary data source.br /br /When you use DefiLlama, you have access to the same data used by central banks and institutions around the world./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHLvvG7UW8AAgXRy.png" /

item.title: Surprising facts about the slave trade
item.description: h1span1. The obstacle to abolition was not the economic system, but an industry lobby./span/h1pspanI had always imagined the British abolitionist movement to be a broad battle between an unstoppable moral imperative and an immovable economic incentive. But in practice it started as more of a knife f

item.title: 🇺🇸 U.S. crypto policy is getting messy. Congress advanced a Fed CBDC ban through 2030, Trump delays signing, and the CLARITY Act heads to a July hearing. Do Bitcoin bulls have reason to get excited? R
item.description: p🇺🇸 U.S. crypto policy is getting messy. Congress advanced a Fed CBDC ban through 2030, Trump delays signing, and the CLARITY Act heads to a July hearing. Do Bitcoin bulls have reason to get excited? Read our summary and take on the chaos here. 👇br /a href="https://app.santiment.net/insights/read/de

item.title: RT by @cryptoquant_com: Avg. USDT perp vol per asset on Binance: Metals Oil Equities Altcoins Crypto exchanges are evolving into RWA exchanges.
item.description: pAvg. USDT perp vol per asset on Binance:br /br /Metals &gt; Oil &gt; Equities &gt; Altcoinsbr /br /Crypto exchanges are evolving into RWA exchanges./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHLoa9aiasAA0Zx4.jpg" /
